changeSet.author: zinin
changeSet.comment: Enforce case-insensitive uniqueness of telegram_users.username so case-variant rows (e.g. 'Alice' and 'alice') cannot coexist. Case-sensitive findByUsername lookups in AddUserCommandHandler and the non-owner /start branch would otherwise be able to create duplicate rows that case-insensitive lookups (AuthorizationFilter, /start owner branch) cannot disambiguate, risking IncorrectResultSizeDataAccessException. If existing data already contains case-variant duplicates this changeset will fail — the duplicates must be reconciled manually before re-running the migration.
changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX uk_telegram_users_username_lower ON telegram_users (LOWER(username));
